title: USGS Energy and Minerals
description: A USGS source card about energy resources, minerals, mapping, and resource decisions.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS energy and minerals resources connect geologic information with energy systems, critical minerals, land use, and national resource questions.
Use this source for students comparing tradeoffs among technology, energy, environment, economy, and policy.
USGS materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some linked media may have separate credit or rights requirements. Check item-level rights.
